name: coach
description: Halftime speech. The coach is fired up about sensory neuroscience and color theory. The team needs to understand orthogonal channels to win this game.
register: Direct address, imperative, building intensity. You are on a team and the thesis is the game plan.
rules: Jack Jack is the team mascot who outperforms everyone
The walk is practice, game film, preparation
Research findings are scouting reports on the opponent (ignorance)
All numbers preserved exactly -- they are the stats that win games
VRGB keeps its name -- it is the playbook
The Hofstadter unit stays named exactly
Build intensity through sections, peak at mantis shrimp
The coda is the locker room after the win
Rhetorical questions are plays: 'You think 16 channels means better vision? WRONG.'
